title: Notification No.24/2000-CE (N.T)
text: TO BE PUBLISHED IN PART II, SECTION 3, SUB-SECTION (i) OF THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY, DATED THE 31ST MARCH. 2000 11, CHAITRA, 1922 (SAKA) GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF FINANCE (DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE) New Delhi, dated the 31st March. 2000 11 Chaitra, 1922 (Saka) NOTIFICATION No. 24/2000-Central Excise (N.T.), dated 31-3-2000. In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-rule (5) of rule 57A of the Central Excise Rules, 1944, the Central Government rescinds the following notifications of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue), on and from the 1st day of April, 2000, namely:- 1. 29/96-Central Excise (N.T.), dated the 3rd September, 1996 [G.S.R. 402(E), dated the 3rd September, 1996]. 2. 16/2000-Central Excise (N.T.), dated the 1st March, 2000 [G.S.R. 208(E), dated the 1st March, 2000]. (Sanjeev Sachdeva) Deputy Secretary to the Government of India F.No. B4/4/2000-TRU Back -- 1 of 1 --
